configurations.name: 1 tabela — selekcija po B+ indeksu
args: SELECT Students.name, Students.gpa FROM Students WHERE Students.id = 42

configurations.name: 1 tabela — selekcija po hash indeksu + range
args: SELECT Students.name FROM Students WHERE Students.dept_id = 5 AND Students.gpa > 3.5

configurations.name: 2 tabele — join s aliasom
args: SELECT s.name, e.grade FROM Students s, Enrollments e WHERE s.id = e.student_id AND s.dept_id = 3

configurations.name: 3 tabele — greedy join ordering
args: SELECT s.name, c.title, e.grade FROM Students s, Enrollments e, Courses c WHERE s.id = e.student_id AND e.course_id = c.id AND s.dept_id = 5

configurations.name: 3 tabele — ORDER BY (external sort)
args: SELECT s.name, c.title FROM Students s, Enrollments e, Courses c WHERE s.id = e.student_id AND e.course_id = c.id ORDER BY s.name

configurations.name: Mali buffer (B=3) — test BNL vs NL
args: SELECT s.name, e.grade FROM Students s, Enrollments e WHERE s.id = e.student_id

configurations.name: K2-2023a — Radi + Zaposleni (hash Ime, B+ clustered Procenat, range)
args: SELECT R.Procenat, R.IDPro, Z.Ime FROM Radi R, Zaposleni Z WHERE Z.IDZap = R.IDZap AND R.Procenat > 99 AND Z.Ime = 'Ivan' ORDER BY R.Procenat

configurations.name: K2-2023b — Radi + Zaposleni (B+ unclustered Ime, B+ clustered IDPro)
args: SELECT R.Procenat, R.IDPro, Z.Ime FROM Radi R, Zaposleni Z WHERE Z.IDZap = R.IDZap AND Z.Ime = 'Nenad' AND R.IDPro = 5001 ORDER BY R.Procenat

configurations.name: TEST 1 — B+ clustering equality  [ocekivano: h+est_blocks = 2+1 = 3]
args: SELECT T1.cat FROM T1 WHERE T1.id = 42

configurations.name: TEST 2 — B+ non-clustering equality  [ocekivano: h+n_match = 2+10 = 12]
args: SELECT T1.score FROM T1 WHERE T1.cat = 3

configurations.name: TEST 3 — Hash non-clustering equality  [ocekivano: 1+n_match = 1+20 = 21]
args: SELECT T1.cat FROM T1 WHERE T1.score = 2

configurations.name: TEST 4 — B+ non-clustering range  [ocekivano: h+est_rows = 2+10 = 12]
args: SELECT T1.score FROM T1 WHERE T1.cat > 7

configurations.name: TEST 5 — Join (sel+BNL)  [ocekivano: sel=12, BNL=1+ceil(1/8)*100=101, ukupno=113]
args: SELECT T1.cat, T2.val FROM T1, T2 WHERE T1.id = T2.t1_id AND T1.cat = 3
